extension.news: v. 1.0.15 "Harbor" - 2026-06-27 - **Download Manager**: Added queued background downloads with progress, cancellation and retry support using the internal downloader, FFmpeg, aria2 or JDownloader. - **Download Destinations**: Added first-use folder selection with writable-path validation and support for local, SMB and NFS destinations. - **Offline videos**: Added an optional, disabled-by-default view for replaying downloaded videos directly from AdultHideout. - **Global Search**: Improved cached return-to-results behavior and request handling for more reliable repeated searches. - **Networking**: Improved DNS retry handling and shared website request behavior. - **New Sites**: Added Faapy and Fapality with search, navigation, pagination and seek-safe direct-stream playback. - **New Site**: Added MangoPorn with movies, clips, search, categories, pagination, sorting and seek-safe direct MP4 playback. - **New Site**: Added XGroovy with populated categories and models, search, pagination, sorting and seek-safe own-CDN KVS MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added InXXX with listings, search, categories, pagination and seek-safe own-CDN KVS MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added XFreeHD with public-video filtering, search, categories, pagination, sorting and seek-safe direct MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added TrannyVideosXXX with populated model folders, search, categories, pagination, sorting and seek-safe direct MP4 playback/recording support. - **New Site**: Added MilfFox with search, categories, models, sorting, pagination, original homepage logo and seek-safe playback/recording from its own video CDN. - **New Site**: Added SexVid with real JPEG thumbnails, search, categories, sorting, pagination, original homepage logo and seek-safe playback/recording from its own CDN. - **New Site**: Added TokyoMotion with search, categories, sorting, pagination, original homepage logo and seek-safe playback/recording from its own video source. - **Interface Polish**: Removed hard-coded German labels from otherwise English site dialogs and navigation.
extension.description:
Internet [COLOR red]XXX Porn Video[COLOR white] Streams.
[COLOR red][B]WARNING:[/B][COLOR red]Only for adults[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]Github: https://github.com/Vashiel/repository.adulthideout [/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.
